codeReview.summary: Implementation provides the merge queue abstraction with GitHub and Mergify provider interfaces. The code builds successfully and all 43 unit tests pass. Both providers are implemented as stubs for MVP - they log operations but don't make actual API calls.

issues.description: GitHubMergeProvider is marked as 'stubbed for MVP' - actual GitHub API integration (POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/mergequeue) is not implemented. This may be intentional for MVP but external API integration is not functional.
MergifyProvider is also marked as 'stubbed for MVP' - actual Mergify API integration (POST /v1/queues/{queue_name}/pull_requests) is not implemented. Same as GitHub provider.
sync_with_provider() async method is a stub that does nothing: 'info!(...)' then returns Ok(()). In real implementation, this would fetch current queue state from the provider.
Warning: unused variable 'merge_result' in test_stats_after_merge. Variable is assigned but never used.
Warning: comparison 'stats.avg_merge_time_ms >= 0' is always true since avg_merge_time_ms is u64 (unsigned). This is a useless comparison.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker added merge_queue.rs but the worker-transcripts.jsonl file does not exist in the mission directory, so transcript review was not possible. Unable to verify if the worker followed proper procedures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission dir /Users/ludwigjonsson/Projects/swell/.factory/missions/67c2b690-f32a-4538-8ff8-3eb2790dc44e/ does not contain handoffs/ directory or worker-transcripts.jsonl

summary: The orch-merge-queue feature implements a merge queue abstraction with GitHub and Mergify provider interfaces. The code builds and all 43 tests pass. However, both GitHubMergeProvider and MergifyProvider are stubs that don't make actual API calls - they just log operations and return success. The atomic stacked PR merge logic is properly implemented in merge_stacked_atomic(). This is appropriate for an MVP but actual external API integration is not implemented yet.
